case_title: CARL ROSAIA VS. JAMES LONG VERNON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROSAIA, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT VERNON, JAMES LONG ENCINOSA, DAISY NUVIOLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ROSAIA, CARL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED JUN-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENCINOSA, DAISY NUVIOLA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY FILED BY ROSAIA, CARL VERNON, JAMES LONG ENCINOSA, DAISY NUVIOLA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY. DEFENDANT JAMES VERNON WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSAIA, CARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERNON, JAMES LONG ENCINOSA, DAISY NUVIOLA $2,023.00 PRINCIPAL, $303.45 INTEREST, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,461.45, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL BILLS AND WAGE LOSS. JOINT AND SEVERAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VERNON, JAMES LONG ENCINOSA, DAISY NUVIOLA
